title: Forgotten Sanity (Joke)
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 11311013: "Forgotten Sanity"}} 

{{Class !}}<nowiki>}}</nowiki>

==Description==
You are in Kitty Hell, Kitty from level 974 has become an insane smiler, and will drive you crazy, the forest of darkness is an insane place, where you must have a lot of almond water with you to gain sanity, you must survive for 24 hours, and a potal will open somewhere in the forest, there are many partygoers and smilers extremely modified and differentiated, Kitty is the king of hell, that thing hears everything, don't make her angry, or she will know your location, run, because hiding is useless. If you stay in the dark too long, you'll start to see smiles that don't even exist, and you'll go crazy and start scratching yourself, and soon you'll become one of them.

===Entities==

Smilers and partygoers.
===Entrances and Exits==
===Entrances===
You can enter by noclipping, in level 'the hub', and by level 1000, if you noclip in the floor.

===Exits===
There is only one a exit of this level, if you survive for 24 hours in the darkness forest, a portal will open in somewhere in the forest.
